ddls:
CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the child resides */,
  "health_severity" TEXT /* Level of health severity (moderate or severe) */,
  "age_months" INTEGER /* Age of the child in months */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the child */,
  "birth_order" INTEGER /* Birth order of the child */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the child */,
  "head_of_household" TEXT /* Indicates if the child is the head of the household */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent of the child */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the child in kilograms */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the child in centimeters */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the child */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the child */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any significant medical history of the child */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population density of the location */,
  "health_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the parent */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the parent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the parent */,
  "present" TEXT /* Indicates if the parent is present in the household */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the parent */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the parent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the parent */,
  "health_history" TEXT /* Any significant health history of the parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parents_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parents_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "number_living" INTEGER /* Number of people living in the household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., nuclear, extended) */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water for the household */,
  "sanitation_type" TEXT /* Type of sanitation facility */,
  "household_income" TEXT /* Total annual income of the household */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing */,
  "electricity_access" TEXT /* Access to electricity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child with the health condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the health condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Status of treatment */,
  "complications" TEXT /* Any complications associated with the health condition */,
  "referral" TEXT /* Any referrals made for the health condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_conditions_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "years_of_education" INTEGER /* Number of years of education completed */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Any additional certifications or degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Start of the age range */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* End of the age range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household composition */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household */,
  "number_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "number_adults" INTEGER /* Number of adults in the household */,
  "number_others" INTEGER /* Number of other residents in the household */,
  "number_elderly" INTEGER /* Number of elderly residents in the household */,
  "number_disabled" INTEGER /* Number of disabled residents in the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_compositions_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health intervention */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child receiving the intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the health intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the intervention */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Total funding amount for the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study participant */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child participating in the study */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the child enrolled in the study */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was obtained from the participant */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant withdrew from the study (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the health report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the health report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the report */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES health_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
